title: hieracium juranum subsp. issleri
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. issleri, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium juranum subsp. issleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity and conservation status.
